StickyApp Home Features Stats Reviews Details Get Started

Welcome to StickyApp

This page tests sticky header behaviour and multi-fold content sampling. Each section uses different typography so below-fold scanning picks up varied styles.

Scroll down. The nav sticks to the top. That's the whole point.

Features

Real-time collaboration across teams. No setup required. Works offline, syncs when you reconnect.

Built-in analytics that actually tell you something useful instead of drowning you in vanity metrics.

Keyboard-first design. Every action reachable without a mouse. Power users don't wait for menus.

Exports to PDF, CSV, and JSON. Your data, your format, your call.

By The Numbers

12,400
Active teams
99.97%
Uptime last 12 months
2.1s
Average page load

What People Say

"Finally, a tool that respects my time. Setup took 3 minutes and it's been solid since."
-- Mika T., Engineering Lead
"The keyboard shortcuts alone save me 20 minutes a day. Not exaggerating."
-- Priya S., Product Manager

Technical Details

StickyApp runs on a JAMstack architecture with edge caching at 200+ global PoPs.

  • End-to-end encryption (AES-256)
  • SOC 2 Type II certified
  • GDPR and CCPA compliant
  • Self-hosted option available

API documentation covers 140+ endpoints with interactive examples. SDKs for Node, Python, Go, and Ruby.

Webhook support for every event type. Zapier and Make integrations out of the box.

Ready?

Free for teams under 10. No credit card. No "trial period" bait-and-switch.

Start Free
